probe: Additional Count to three. blocker probes separating prefill/decode f16 effects and emulating ggml-style KQV lane accumulation

rejected_variants.notes: Applying crude value-product f16 only during prompt/prefill still overcorrects into the bad early first-token path.
Prefill-only probability f16 leaves the dot path unchanged.
Combined prefill-only variant leaves the dot path unchanged.
Decode-only value-product rounding leaves the dot path unchanged.
Decode-only probability rounding leaves the dot path unchanged.
A simple f16-probability plus lane-grouped KQV accumulation emulation did not flip the step-2 near-tie.

source_notes.llama_cpp_mapping: simd-mappings.h uses an AVX512 FP16 mapping when compiled with __AVX512FP16__, but the Count to three. short attention lengths are below the 128-value F16_STEP main loop, so scalar/tail and operand materialization details remain the likely target.

current_localization: The blocker survived prefill-only/decode-only coarse f16 separation and a simple KQV lane-accumulation approximation. The next productive step is a direct small harness against ggml's actual f16 mul_mat/vec_dot for the captured KQV tensors, or adding temporary tensor dump hooks to compare Camelid vs llama.cpp KQV inputs at the divergent step.
support_boundary: Evidence only; no broad Mixtral, frontend, long-context, production, neighboring-row, or full-support claim.
